name: json_tool_calls_function_parameters_20260528
notes: JSON tool_calls using function.parameters should preserve parameters as tool arguments.

content.text: I need the raw JSON tool_calls array for reading forest-scene.html. Put it in your answer as JSON and also perform it. Use command ["powershell.exe", "-Command", "Get-Content forest-scene.html -TotalCount 1"] in workdir "C:\\Users\\example\\source\\repos\\glm-test".

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Runs a Powershell command (Windows) and returns its output. Arguments to shell are passed to CreateProcessW(). Most commands should be prefixed with ["powershell.exe", "-Command"].

workdir.description: The working directory to execute the command in.

timeout_ms.description: The timeout for the command in milliseconds.

tools.name: view_image
tools.description: View a local image from the filesystem.

path.description: Local filesystem path to an image file.
